inline_comments.message:
Where are retrieving target software version from user param , this pdf says that userparam will contain targetsoftwareversion. refer link below.

https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/PNF+software+upgrade+in+R6+Frankfurt?preview=/64007696/71841930/SO%20API%20requirements%20in%20R6.pdf

Since this processPNFCustomWorkflowRequest should be generic for all custom PNF workflow, user parameters which is specific for PNF Software upgrade UC will not be processed here. Instead, UC-specific user parameters should be processed in certain workflows (maybe in corresponding BBs or its preprocessing steps)
Correct! will fix it in a more generic way in following patch.
isn't one of the key is targetSoftwareVersion for testing purpose?
imo, any key like "key1“ here is more generic
